summary: Frontend testing completed for coach ratings visibility feature. Verified ratings are hidden from non-admin roles (Coachee, Coach) and visible only to Admin. All 9 test cases passed.

issues: Avg Session Rating shows 4.7 instead of 4.8 mentioned in requirements - minor mock data discrepancy

test_credentials: No credentials needed. Role selection buttons on /login page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested rating visibility across all roles. Login page (/login) has role selection. Coachee dashboard shows 'Active Coaches' instead of 'Coach Rating'. Coach dashboard has no star rating or 'Overall Rating' card. Coaches page sort button shows 'Sort by Slots/Name'. Request wizard step 3 shows no rating next to coach location. Admin dashboard correctly shows 'Avg Session Rating' (4.7) and 'Rating Distribution' chart.

login_page.test: Login page should NOT show '4.8 Avg Rating' stat
login_page.details: Header shows '50+ Active Coaches', '248 Sessions Completed', 'ICF Certified' - no rating stat

coachee_dashboard.test: Coachee Dashboard should show 'Active Coaches' instead of 'Coach Rating'
coachee_dashboard.details: Stat card shows '1 Active Coaches' with Fatema Hunaid listed

coach_dashboard_header.test: Coach Dashboard header should NOT show star rating next to coach name
coach_dashboard_header.details: Header shows 'Fatema Hunaid, Executive Coach' with no star rating

coach_dashboard_overall_rating.test: Coach Dashboard should NOT have 'Overall Rating' card
coach_dashboard_overall_rating.details: Right panel shows 'Active Coachees' and 'Availability' cards - no rating card

coaches_page_sort.test: Coaches page sort button should say 'Sort by Slots' or 'Sort by Name'

coach_cards_rating.test: Coach cards should NOT display star ratings
coach_cards_rating.details: No star icons or rating numbers in coach cards

request_wizard_review.test: Request Wizard step 3 should NOT show rating next to coach location
request_wizard_review.details: Coach panel shows name, badge, location (Mumbai, India), about, expertise - no rating

admin_avg_rating.test: Admin Dashboard should show 'Avg Session Rating' stat
admin_avg_rating.details: Stat card shows '4.7 Avg Session Rating' with star icon

admin_rating_distribution.test: Admin Dashboard should show 'Rating Distribution' chart
admin_rating_distribution.details: Bar chart visible showing 5 Star through 1 Star distribution
